items.html: Until now she was one measure without a Partzuf, though she was comprised of ten Sefirot. Thus she is only a single Sefira, but divided into ten points — and they are not complete Sefirot, for then she would be a Partzuf. Rather, they are only ten small points, and all of them together are but one Sefira. Thus she is now the tenth part; and in order for her to grow like ZA [Zeir Anpin], this point must divide into ten points, and then each point of them will grow nine other points, and then they will be ten Sefirot, each of them comprising ten points.
